profile.headline: Senior Backend Engineer | Python, FastAPI, Distributed Systems, Search/Ranking
profile.summary: Backend engineer with 7.2 years of experience building production API platforms and the search/ranking infrastructure behind them. I've shipped end-to-end retrieval and recommendation systems to real users at a product company — hybrid BM25 + dense-embedding retrieval over OpenSearch with a learning-to-rank reranker, instrumented with NDCG/MRR offline eval and online A/B tests. My core toolkit is Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kubernetes, and I've owned services from schema to on-call. I care about code quality and write a lot of design docs. I want to keep working at the intersection of backend systems and applied retrieval/ranking.

career_history.title: Senior Backend Engineer
career_history.description: Own the search and recommendations backend for a B2B marketplace serving ~2M monthly users. Built a v2 ranking system replacing rule-based scoring: hybrid retrieval (BM25 over OpenSearch + sentence-transformers dense vectors in FAISS) feeding an XGBoost learning-to-rank reranker. Designed the offline eval harness (NDCG@10, MRR) and the online A/B framework that proved a 14% lift in recruiter engagement. Services are FastAPI on Kubernetes; I own schema design in PostgreSQL, Redis caching, and the on-call rotation.

career_history.title: Backend Engineer
career_history.description: Built and maintained REST APIs in Python (FastAPI and Flask) for a logistics platform processing ~800k events/day. Implemented an Elasticsearch-backed product search with relevance tuning, and migrated a monolith service to containerized microservices on Kubernetes. Wrote most of the integration test suite and introduced structured logging and tracing.
